app.title: InventoryHero
app.loading_content: Almost ready! 🚀 We’re fine-tuning everything for you. 🛠️

items.filtered_all: No items match the given filter

delete_confirmation.title: Are you sure?
delete_confirmation.text: This will delete all instances of this item and cannot be undone

boxes.filtered_all: No boxes match the given filter

rooms.filtered_all: No rooms match the given filter

delete_confirmation.text: This will delete all children of this room. This means that all boxes and items stored inside (and all items stored inside those boxes) will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
delete_confirmation.title: Delete Room {name}

form.name: Name
form.name_required: A name needs to be entered

form.name: Name
form.name_required: A name needs to be entered

form.name: Name
form.name_required: A name (or existing item) needs to be selected
form.parent_needed: A storage for the item needs to be selected

rules.name_required: A name needs to be supplied

leave.title: Leave Household {name}
leave.text: Leaving this household can not be undone. To rejoin the household you'll need to ask the owner for a new invite.

not_found.title: Household Not Found 😔
not_found.text: We couldn't locate the household you’re looking for. It might have been removed or not available at the moment. Try refreshing the page to see if that helps.

no_rights.title: Permission Required 🔒
no_rights.text: You don’t have permission to edit this household. Only the creator or owner of the household can make changes. Please suggest your changes to the owner of this household

confirm.text: Are you sure you want to delete this household? This action is permanent and cannot be undone. All data related to the household will be permanently removed, and members will no longer have access to it. Please confirm if you wish to proceed.
confirm.title: ⚠️ Confirm Household Deletion 🗑️

confirm.text: Are you sure you want to transfer ownership of this household? This action is permanent and cannot be undone. Ownership and all permissions, including the ability to edit, delete, and invite users to the household, will be transferred to the chosen user: {user}. Please confirm if you wish to proceed.
confirm.title: ⚠️ Confirm Ownership Transfer 🏠

confirm.text: Are you sure you want to remove this user from the household? This action will be executed immediately and cannot be undone. The user will be removed from the household, and if they wish to rejoin, a new invite will need to be issued. Please confirm if you wish to proceed.
confirm.title: 🚪 Confirm User Removal 🚫

confirm.text: Are you sure you want to delete this invite? This action will invalidate the invite link, and any user attempting to join with this link will not be able to. If you want to invite the user again, a new invite will need to be issued. Please confirm if you wish to proceed.
confirm.title: ❌ Confirm Invite Deletion 🚫

no_member_of_household.title: Who are you?
no_member_of_household.text: You are not a member of this household. Request an invite from the owner to inventory in this household.

transfer.title: Transfer household to {user}?
transfer.text: You cannot undo this and will only have member rights until {user} grants you more rights again

kick.title: Kick {user} from household?
kick.text: You cannot undo this and you will need to generate a new invite if {user} should join again

rules.name_required: A name needs to be set!
rules.name_shorter_than: The name must be shorter than 26 characters

invite.title: Invite your friend
invite.text:
Hey! 🎉

Let’s get organized together! 📦 

I’ve been using InventoryHero to manage my stuff, and I think you’ll love it too! Check it out and join me here: 

{inviteLink}
invite.copy_to_clipboard: Copy the invite link into your clipboard...

join.title: {owner} wants you to join their household!
join.text: If you want to join the their household {name} and start inventorying with {owner} accept below.
join.invite_invalid: Looks like this invite is not valid
join.user_already_member_of_household: You are already a member of this household, just select it form your household selection and you can start inventorying!

rules.username_required: The username field cannot be empty
rules.email_required: The email field cannot be empty

rules.mismatch: The new passwords do not match

forgot-password.title: E-Mail sent
forgot-password.text: You'll receive an E-Mail with instructions on how to reset your password

rules.username_needed: An username needs to be supplied
rules.password_needed: A password needs to be supplied

confirmation_missing.title: E-Mail not yet confirmed
confirmation_missing.text: Your E-Mail address has net been confirmed yet, to login you need to do this first. Click here to request a new confirmation code

reset-password.smtp_disabled: Your administrator did not enable E-Mails, therefore you cannot use this feature. To reset your password, contact your administrator
reset-password.title: Reset password
reset-password.description: If we can find an account with the specified email, you will receive an email with instructions to reset your password
reset-password.token_invalid: The used reset token has become invalid. Please request a new request token to proceed.

rules.username_fmt_rule: Username must be 3-25 characters long and can only include letters, numbers, dots, hyphens, and underscores.

label.description_1: Select for which objects you want to create labels
